author: rpatel
message: Read inventory availability from local cache instead of calling the inventory API
diff:
--- a/orders/inventory_client.py
+++ b/orders/inventory_client.py
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ def check_availability(sku):
-    return _fetch_from_api(sku).get("available", False)
+    return _CACHE[f"sku_{sku}"]["available"]

author: jsmith
message: Add retry wrapper around order creation
diff:
--- a/orders/order_service.py
+++ b/orders/order_service.py
@@ -40,7 +40,10 @@ def create_order(cart):
-    return _persist(cart)
+    for attempt in range(3):
+        try:
+            return _persist(cart)
+        except TransientDBError:
+            continue

author: mchen
diff:
--- a/notifications/sms.py
+++ b/notifications/sms.py
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ def render(order):
-    return f"Order {order.id} confirmed"
+    return f"Order {order.id} confirmed for {order.customer_name}"
